WhisperModel.description: WhisperModel class for training Whisper models without a language model head.

WhisperProcessor.description: Represents a WhisperProcessor that extracts features from an audio input.

WhisperTimeStampLogitsProcessor.description: A LogitsProcessor that handles adding timestamps to generated text.

window_function.description: Returns an array containing the specified window.

XLMForQuestionAnswering.description: XLM Model with a span classification head on top for extractive question-answering tasks

XLMForSequenceClassification.description: XLM Model with a sequence classification/regression head on top (a linear layer on top of the pooled output)

XLMForTokenClassification.description: XLM Model with a token classification head on top (a linear layer on top of the hidden-states output)

XLMModel.description: The bare XLM Model transformer outputting raw hidden-states without any specific head on top.

XLMPreTrainedModel.description: An abstract class to handle weights initialization and a simple interface for downloading and loading pretrained models.

XLMRobertaForMaskedLM.description: XLMRobertaForMaskedLM class for performing masked language modeling on XLMRoberta models.

XLMRobertaForQuestionAnswering.description: XLMRobertaForQuestionAnswering class for performing question answering on XLMRoberta models.

XLMRobertaForSequenceClassification.description: XLMRobertaForSequenceClassification class for performing sequence classification on XLMRoberta models.

XLMRobertaForTokenClassification.description: XLMRobertaForTokenClassification class for performing token classification on XLMRoberta models.

XLMWithLMHeadModel.description: The XLM Model transformer with a language modeling head on top (linear layer with weights tied to the input embeddings).

XVectorOutput.description: Base class for outputs of XVector models.

ZeroShotAudioClassificationPipeline.description: Zero shot audio classification pipeline using `ClapModel`. This pipeline predicts the class of an audio when you

ZeroShotAudioClassificationPipelineCallb.description: Classify the sequence(s) given as inputs.

ZeroShotAudioClassificationPipelineOptio.description: Parameters specific to zero-shot audio classification pipelines.

ZeroShotClassificationPipeline.description: NLI-based zero-shot classification pipeline using a `ModelForSequenceClassification`

ZeroShotClassificationPipelineCallback.description: Classify the sequence(s) given as inputs.

ZeroShotClassificationPipelineOptions.description: Parameters specific to zero-shot classification pipelines.

ZeroShotImageClassificationPipeline.description: Zero shot image classification pipeline. This pipeline predicts the class of

ZeroShotImageClassificationPipelineCallb.description: Assign labels to the image(s) passed as inputs.

ZeroShotImageClassificationPipelineOptio.description: Parameters specific to zero-shot image classification pipelines.

ZeroShotObjectDetectionPipeline.description: Zero-shot object detection pipeline. This pipeline predicts bounding boxes of

ZeroShotObjectDetectionPipelineCallback.description: Detect objects (bounding boxes & classes) in the image(s) passed as inputs.

ZeroShotObjectDetectionPipelineOptions.description: Parameters specific to zero-shot object detection pipelines.

createLogger.description: Creates a new logger instance with the specified log level.

DB.description: Represents the raw database client from the `pg` library.

Document.description: Represents a text-based document in the database.

DocumentInput.description: Input for creating a new document.

DocumentWithScore.description: A document augmented with search relevance scores.

Entity.description: Represents a JSON-based entity in the database.

EntityInput.description: Input for creating a new entity.

EntityPatch.description: Represents a patch for updating an entity. `projectId` cannot be changed.

EntityWithScore.description: An entity augmented with search relevance scores.

MatchParams.description: Parameters for filtering results in match and search operations.

OpenDbOptions.description: Options for opening a database connection.

SearchParams.description: Parameters for performing a hybrid search.
